Client_Init.usage:
import { PachcaClient } from "@pachca/sdk"

const client = new PachcaClient("YOUR_TOKEN")

SecurityOperations_getAuditEvents.usage:
const response = client.security.getAuditEvents({
  startTime: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  endTime: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  eventKey: AuditEventKey.UserLogin,
  actorId: "example",
  actorType: "example",
  entityId: "example",
  entityType: "example",
  limit: 123,
  cursor: "example"
})

BotOperations_updateBot.usage:
const request: BotUpdateRequest = { bot: { webhook: { outgoingUrl: "example" } } }
const response = client.bots.updateBot(123, request)
BotOperations_updateBot.output: BotResponse({ id: number, webhook: BotResponseWebhook({ outgoingUrl: string }) })

ChatOperations_listChats.usage:
const response = client.chats.listChats({
  sortId: SortOrder.Asc,
  availability: ChatAvailability.IsMember,
  lastMessageAtAfter: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  lastMessageAtBefore: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  personal: true,
  limit: 123,
  cursor: "example"
})

ChatOperations_getChat.output: Chat({ id: number, name: string, createdAt: string, ownerId: number, memberIds: number[], groupTagIds: number[], channel: boolean, personal: boolean, public: boolean, lastMessageAt: string, meetRoomUrl: string })

ChatOperations_createChat.output: Chat({ id: number, name: string, createdAt: string, ownerId: number, memberIds: number[], groupTagIds: number[], channel: boolean, personal: boolean, public: boolean, lastMessageAt: string, meetRoomUrl: string })

ChatOperations_updateChat.usage:
const request: ChatUpdateRequest = { chat: { name: "example", public: true } }
const response = client.chats.updateChat(123, request)
ChatOperations_updateChat.output: Chat({ id: number, name: string, createdAt: string, ownerId: number, memberIds: number[], groupTagIds: number[], channel: boolean, personal: boolean, public: boolean, lastMessageAt: string, meetRoomUrl: string })

ExportOperations_requestExport.usage:
const request: ExportRequest = {
  startAt: "2024-01-01",
  endAt: "2024-01-01",
  webhookUrl: "example",
  chatIds: [123],
  skipChatsFile: true
}
client.common.requestExport(request)

DirectUploadOperations_uploadFile.usage:
const request: FileUploadRequest = {
  contentDisposition: "example",
  acl: "example",
  policy: "example",
  xAmzCredential: "example",
  xAmzAlgorithm: "example",
  xAmzDate: "example",
  xAmzSignature: "example",
  key: "example",
  file: new Blob([])
}
client.common.uploadFile("https://example.com", request)

UploadOperations_getUploadParams.output: UploadParams({ contentDisposition: string, acl: string, policy: string, xAmzCredential: string, xAmzAlgorithm: string, xAmzDate: string, xAmzSignature: string, key: string, directUrl: string })

ChatMemberOperations_addMembers.usage:
const request: AddMembersRequest = { memberIds: [123], silent: true }
client.members.addMembers(123, request)

GroupTagOperations_getTag.output: GroupTag({ id: number, name: string, usersCount: number })

GroupTagOperations_createTag.usage:
const request: GroupTagRequest = { groupTag: { name: "example" } }
const response = client.groupTags.createTag(request)
GroupTagOperations_createTag.output: GroupTag({ id: number, name: string, usersCount: number })

GroupTagOperations_updateTag.usage:
const request: GroupTagRequest = { groupTag: { name: "example" } }
const response = client.groupTags.updateTag(123, request)
GroupTagOperations_updateTag.output: GroupTag({ id: number, name: string, usersCount: number })

MessageOperations_getMessage.output: Message({ id: number, entityType: MessageEntityType, entityId: number, chatId: number, rootChatId: number, content: string, userId: number, createdAt: string, url: string, files: File({ id: number, key: string, name: string, fileType: FileType, url: string, width?: number | null, height?: number | null })[], buttons: Button({ text: string, url?: string, data?: string })[][] | null, thread: Thread({ id: number, chatId: number, messageId: number, messageChatId: number, updatedAt: string }) | null, forwarding: Forwarding({ originalMessageId: number, originalChatId: number, authorId: number, originalCreatedAt: string, originalThreadId: number | null, originalThreadMessageId: number | null, originalThreadParentChatId: number | null }) | null, parentMessageId: number | null, displayAvatarUrl: string | null, displayName: string | null, changedAt: string | null, deletedAt: string | null })

MessageOperations_createMessage.output: Message({ id: number, entityType: MessageEntityType, entityId: number, chatId: number, rootChatId: number, content: string, userId: number, createdAt: string, url: string, files: File({ id: number, key: string, name: string, fileType: FileType, url: string, width?: number | null, height?: number | null })[], buttons: Button({ text: string, url?: string, data?: string })[][] | null, thread: Thread({ id: number, chatId: number, messageId: number, messageChatId: number, updatedAt: string }) | null, forwarding: Forwarding({ originalMessageId: number, originalChatId: number, authorId: number, originalCreatedAt: string, originalThreadId: number | null, originalThreadMessageId: number | null, originalThreadParentChatId: number | null }) | null, parentMessageId: number | null, displayAvatarUrl: string | null, displayName: string | null, changedAt: string | null, deletedAt: string | null })

MessageOperations_updateMessage.output: Message({ id: number, entityType: MessageEntityType, entityId: number, chatId: number, rootChatId: number, content: string, userId: number, createdAt: string, url: string, files: File({ id: number, key: string, name: string, fileType: FileType, url: string, width?: number | null, height?: number | null })[], buttons: Button({ text: string, url?: string, data?: string })[][] | null, thread: Thread({ id: number, chatId: number, messageId: number, messageChatId: number, updatedAt: string }) | null, forwarding: Forwarding({ originalMessageId: number, originalChatId: number, authorId: number, originalCreatedAt: string, originalThreadId: number | null, originalThreadMessageId: number | null, originalThreadParentChatId: number | null }) | null, parentMessageId: number | null, displayAvatarUrl: string | null, displayName: string | null, changedAt: string | null, deletedAt: string | null })

ReactionOperations_addReaction.usage:
const request: ReactionRequest = { code: "example", name: "example" }
const response = client.reactions.addReaction(123, request)
ReactionOperations_addReaction.output: Reaction({ userId: number, createdAt: string, code: string, name?: string })

ThreadOperations_getThread.output: Thread({ id: number, chatId: number, messageId: number, messageChatId: number, updatedAt: string })

ThreadOperations_createThread.output: Thread({ id: number, chatId: number, messageId: number, messageChatId: number, updatedAt: string })

OAuthOperations_getTokenInfo.output: AccessTokenInfo({ id: number, token: string, name: string | null, userId: number, scopes: OAuthScope[], createdAt: string, revokedAt: string | null, expiresIn: number | null, lastUsedAt: string | null })

ProfileOperations_getProfile.output: User({ id: number, firstName: string, lastName: string, nickname: string, email: string, phoneNumber: string, department: string, title: string, role: UserRole, suspended: boolean, inviteStatus: InviteStatus, listTags: string[], customProperties: CustomProperty({ id: number, name: string, dataType: CustomPropertyDataType, value: string })[], userStatus: UserStatus({ emoji: string, title: string, expiresAt: string | null, isAway: boolean, awayMessage: UserStatusAwayMessage({ text: string }) | null }) | null, bot: boolean, sso: boolean, createdAt: string, lastActivityAt: string, timeZone: string, imageUrl: string | null })

ProfileOperations_updateStatus.output: UserStatus({ emoji: string, title: string, expiresAt: string | null, isAway: boolean, awayMessage: UserStatusAwayMessage({ text: string }) | null })

SearchOperations_searchChats.usage:
const response = client.search.searchChats({
  query: "example",
  limit: 123,
  cursor: "example",
  order: SortOrder.Asc,
  createdFrom: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  createdTo: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  active: true,
  chatSubtype: ChatSubtype.Discussion,
  personal: true
})

SearchOperations_searchMessages.usage:
const response = client.search.searchMessages({
  query: "example",
  limit: 123,
  cursor: "example",
  order: SortOrder.Asc,
  createdFrom: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  createdTo: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  chatIds: [123],
  userIds: [123],
  active: true
})

SearchOperations_searchUsers.usage:
const response = client.search.searchUsers({
  query: "example",
  limit: 123,
  cursor: "example",
  sort: SearchSortOrder.ByScore,
  order: SortOrder.Asc,
  createdFrom: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  createdTo: "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  companyRoles: [UserRole.Admin]
})

TaskOperations_getTask.output: Task({ id: number, kind: TaskKind, content: string, dueAt: string | null, priority: number, userId: number, chatId: number | null, status: TaskStatus, createdAt: string, performerIds: number[], allDay: boolean, customProperties: CustomProperty({ id: number, name: string, dataType: CustomPropertyDataType, value: string })[] })

TaskOperations_createTask.output: Task({ id: number, kind: TaskKind, content: string, dueAt: string | null, priority: number, userId: number, chatId: number | null, status: TaskStatus, createdAt: string, performerIds: number[], allDay: boolean, customProperties: CustomProperty({ id: number, name: string, dataType: CustomPropertyDataType, value: string })[] })

TaskOperations_updateTask.output: Task({ id: number, kind: TaskKind, content: string, dueAt: string | null, priority: number, userId: number, chatId: number | null, status: TaskStatus, createdAt: string, performerIds: number[], allDay: boolean, customProperties: CustomProperty({ id: number, name: string, dataType: CustomPropertyDataType, value: string })[] })

UserOperations_getUser.output: User({ id: number, firstName: string, lastName: string, nickname: string, email: string, phoneNumber: string, department: string, title: string, role: UserRole, suspended: boolean, inviteStatus: InviteStatus, listTags: string[], customProperties: CustomProperty({ id: number, name: string, dataType: CustomPropertyDataType, value: string })[], userStatus: UserStatus({ emoji: string, title: string, expiresAt: string | null, isAway: boolean, awayMessage: UserStatusAwayMessage({ text: string }) | null }) | null, bot: boolean, sso: boolean, createdAt: string, lastActivityAt: string, timeZone: string, imageUrl: string | null })

UserOperations_createUser.usage:
const request: UserCreateRequest = {
  user: {
    firstName: "example",
    lastName: "example",
    email: "example",
    phoneNumber: "example",
    nickname: "example",
    department: "example",
    title: "example",
    role: UserRole.Admin,
    suspended: true,
    listTags: ["example"],
    customProperties: [{ id: 123, value: "example" }]
  },
  skipEmailNotify: true
}
const response = client.users.createUser(request)
UserOperations_createUser.output: User({ id: number, firstName: string, lastName: string, nickname: string, email: string, phoneNumber: string, department: string, title: string, role: UserRole, suspended: boolean, inviteStatus: InviteStatus, listTags: string[], customProperties: CustomProperty({ id: number, name: string, dataType: CustomPropertyDataType, value: string })[], userStatus: UserStatus({ emoji: string, title: string, expiresAt: string | null, isAway: boolean, awayMessage: UserStatusAwayMessage({ text: string }) | null }) | null, bot: boolean, sso: boolean, createdAt: string, lastActivityAt: string, timeZone: string, imageUrl: string | null })

UserOperations_updateUser.output: User({ id: number, firstName: string, lastName: string, nickname: string, email: string, phoneNumber: string, department: string, title: string, role: UserRole, suspended: boolean, inviteStatus: InviteStatus, listTags: string[], customProperties: CustomProperty({ id: number, name: string, dataType: CustomPropertyDataType, value: string })[], userStatus: UserStatus({ emoji: string, title: string, expiresAt: string | null, isAway: boolean, awayMessage: UserStatusAwayMessage({ text: string }) | null }) | null, bot: boolean, sso: boolean, createdAt: string, lastActivityAt: string, timeZone: string, imageUrl: string | null })

UserStatusOperations_updateUserStatus.output: UserStatus({ emoji: string, title: string, expiresAt: string | null, isAway: boolean, awayMessage: UserStatusAwayMessage({ text: string }) | null })
